sections.paragraph: (“a hedge” ה = ֹו, ֹון [Socoh, Shochoh, Sochoh], pr.n. of a town in the plain country of Judah, Jos 15:35. [Prob. there were two towns of this name; the one in the mountains, Jos 15:48 the other in the plain, Jos 15:35. Both of these appear now to bear the same name, Shuweikeh الشويكه, Rob. 195, 343.]
